amenity.amenity-academically-qualified-person-aq:
To obtain this SmartCard you need to achieve:

  • ROLO Operative Health, Safety and Environmental Awareness Course
  • CITB Operative Touch Screen Test (other specialist touch screen tests can also be accepted e.g. Working at Heights and Highway Works)

You must ensure the relevant ROLO and CITB Touch Screen Test have been completed within the last two years upon application.

Please note this LISS/CSCS SmartCard is valid for five years. Holders of these cards are required to apply for a new card rather than apply to renew an existing card.

Check your qualifications.

To locate your nearest ROLO Operative Training Provider check our online directory.

To book your CITB Operative Touch Screen Test click here.

Your Occupational Title on the reverse of the SmartCard will be:

  • Amenity Related Degree/HND/HNC

amenity.amenity-experienced-technical-supervisor:

Registered to a Level 3 Diploma/NVQ/SVQ appropriate to Amenity

You will need to achieve:

  • ROLO Health, Safety and Environmental Awareness Course for for Supervisors

Registered to a Level 4 Diploma/NVQ/SVQ appropriate to Amenity

You will need to achieve:

  • ROLO Health, Safety and Environmental Awareness Course for Manager

For both routes, you must ensure the relevant ROLO and CITB Touch Screen Test have been completed within the last two years upon application.

Check your qualifications.

  • CITB Operative Touch Screen Test (other specialist touch screen tests can also be accepted e.g. Working at Heights and Highway Works)

You must ensure the relevant ROLO and CITB Touch Screen Test have been completed within the last two years upon application.

You will also need to have:

  • Successfully completed the appropriate training and assessment (refresher training when applicable).

Check your qualifications.

To locate your nearest ROLO Operative Training Provider check our online directory.

To book your CITB Operative Touch Screen Test click here.

Your Occupational Title on the reverse of the SmartCard will be applicable to your qualification route:

  • Chainsaw Maintenance and Cross-cutting ONLY
  • Tree Climbing & Aerial Rescue
  • Stump Grinder
  • Arborist Worker Chainsaw Groundsman
  • Arborist Worker Chainsaw Ground-based
  • Arborist Worker Chainsaw Advanced Ground-based
  • Arborist Worker Chainsaw Off Ground
  • Arborist Worker Chainsaw Advanced Off Ground
  • Forest Worker Feller Buncher Operator 
  • Forest Worker Harvest Operator
  • Forest Worker Forward Extraction Operator
  • Forest Worker Skidder Extraction Operator
  • Forest Worker Establishment Operator
  • Forest Worker Flail/Mulcher
  • Professional Tree Inspector
  • Utility Arb Surveyor (Elec)
  • Utility Arb Surveyor (Rail)

Any Chainsaw qualifications that are applicable and are more than 5 years old will require either, evidence of refresher training, or evidence of upskilling to a higher level chainsaw qualification.

Any refresher training must be supported by certification from Lantra or a City and Guilds Digital Certificate at a grade 3 or above (full access to the digital certificate must be given so we can validate the grade).

Please note this LISS/CSCS SmartCard is valid for five years.
